steps.title: Find the cube side length
steps.content:
For a cube with side length $s$, the volume is $s^3$. Since the volume is $438{,}976$, solve $s^3=438{,}976$. Testing nearby cube roots gives
$$76^3=438{,}976$$
so $s=76$.

steps.title: Compute the surface area
steps.content:
A cube has $6$ congruent square faces, so its surface area is $6s^2$.
$$6(76)^2=6(5{,}776)=34{,}656$$
The answer is 34656.
